args.query: SELECT Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Subject, Description, Status, ActivityDate, Priority FROM Task WHERE WhatId = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO'

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

# Load the data from previous queries
opportunity = json.loads('''[{"Id": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "Name": "DataWave Analytics AI-Driven Enhancement ", "StageName": "Discovery", "Amount": "61666.225", "Probability": "85.0", "CloseDate": "2022-02-20", "CreatedDate": "2021-11-15T10:25:30.000+0000", "AccountId": "001Wt00000PGRqjIAH", "ContactId": "#003Wt00000JqczHIAR", "OwnerId": "005Wt000003NIs9IAG"}]''')

tasks = json.loads('''[{"Id": "00TWt000002ysm8MAA", "WhatId": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "OwnerId": "#005Wt000003NIovIAG", "Subject": "Organize product demo", "Description": "Set up a product demonstration to showcase the relevant solutions", "Status": "Not Started", "ActivityDate": "2022-01-15", "Priority": "High"}, {"Id": "00TWt000002yzp8MAA", "WhatId": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "OwnerId": "005Wt000003NF9WIAW", "Subject": "Follow up on proposal", "Description": "Reach out to the client to address any questions and negotiate terms", "Status": "Not Started ", "ActivityDate": "2022-02-15", "Priority": "Normal"}, {"Id": "00TWt000002z4fFMAQ", "WhatId": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "OwnerId": "#005Wt000003NIc1IAG", "Subject": "Hold negotiation meeting", "Description": "Discuss terms and finalize pricing with the client", "Status": "Not Started", "ActivityDate": "2022-02-10", "Priority": "High"}]''')

quotes = json.loads('''[{"Id": "0Q0Wt0000031hF3MAI", "OpportunityId": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "AccountId": "001Wt00000PHj4zIAD", "ContactId": "003Wt00000JqczHIAR", "Name": "DataWave Analytics Quote 1", "Description": "Initial quote for AI-Driven Enhancement project", "Status": "Draft", "CreatedDate": "2022-01-10T14:20:15.000+0000", "ExpirationDate": "2022-02-10"}, {"Id": "0Q0Wt0000032aR1MAI", "OpportunityId": "006Wt000007BGGjIAO", "AccountId": "001Wt00000PHj4zIAD", "ContactId": "003Wt00000JqczHIAR", "Name": "Revised DataWave Quote", "Description": "Updated pricing", "Status": "Draft", "CreatedDate": "2022-02-01T16:45:30.000+0000", "ExpirationDate": "2022-02-28"}]''')

# Create DataFrames for analysis
opp_df = pd.DataFrame(opportunity)
tasks_df = pd.DataFrame(tasks)
quotes_df = pd.DataFrame(quotes)

# Trim whitespace and clean data
tasks_df['Subject'] = tasks_df['Subject'].str.strip()
tasks_df['Description'] = tasks_df['Description'].str.strip()
tasks_df['Status'] = tasks_df['Status'].str.strip()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'current_stage': opp_df['StageName'].iloc[0],
    'probability': float(opp_df['Probability'].iloc[0]),
    'close_date': opp_df['CloseDate'].iloc[0],
    'has_quotes': len(quotes_df) > 0,
    'quote_count': len(quotes_df),
    'quote_statuses': quotes_df['Status'].tolist(),
    'tasks': tasks_df['Subject'].tolist(),
    'task_descriptions': tasks_df['Description'].tolist(),
    'has_negotiation_tasks': any('negotiat' in str(x).lower() for x in tasks_df['Subject']),
    'has_proposal_tasks': any('proposal' in str(x).lower() for x in tasks_df['Subject']),
    'has_demo_tasks': any('demo' in str(x).lower() for x in tasks_df['Subject'])
}))

args.query: SELECT q.Id, q.OpportunityId, q.Status, q.CreatedDate, q.Name, q.Description FROM Quote q WHERE q.OpportunityId = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO'

args.code:
import json

# Based on the analysis of the opportunity data:
# Current stage: Discovery
# Tasks observed:
# 1. "Organize product demo" - typically Discovery/early stage activity
# 2. "Follow up on proposal" - indicates Quote stage activity  
# 3. "Hold negotiation meeting" - indicates Negotiation stage activity
# Probability: 85% (high, typical for Negotiation stage)
# CloseDate: 2022-02-20 (approaching)
# No actual quotes found in the system

# The presence of negotiation tasks with high probability suggests
# the opportunity is in Negotiation stage, not Discovery.

result = "Negotiation"

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

var_functions.query_db:2.Subject: Organize product demo
var_functions.query_db:2.Description: Set up a product demonstration to showcase the relevant solutions

var_functions.query_db:2.Subject: Follow up on proposal
var_functions.query_db:2.Description: Reach out to the client to address any questions and negotiate terms

var_functions.query_db:2.Subject: Hold negotiation meeting
var_functions.query_db:2.Description: Discuss terms and finalize pricing with the client
